src: Shopify’s Mobile Buy SDK makes it simple to sell physical products inside your mobile app. With a few lines of code, you can connect your app with the Shopify platform and let your users buy your products using Apple Pay or their credit card.
ja: ShopifyのMobile Buy SDKを使えば、モバイルアプリ内で物理的な商品を簡単に販売できます。数行のコードでアプリをShopifyプラットフォームに接続し、Apple Payまたはクレジットカードで商品を購入できるようにします。
